title: Context Assembly Record
description: Traceability record produced alongside every context bundle. Captures which sections were included or excluded, token budget and usage, overflow actions taken, and retrieval status.

context_id.description: Matches the context_id of the assembled context bundle.

task_type.description: AI task type for which the context bundle was assembled.

source_artifact_ids.description: Identifiers of all source artifacts that contributed to the bundle.

included_sections.description: Context sections that are populated and included in the bundle.

excluded_sections.description: Context sections that are absent or empty in the bundle.

token_budget.description: Total token budget configured in the policy. Null when no policy was applied.

token_usage.description: Estimated total token count of the assembled bundle.

overflow_actions_taken.description: List of overflow or truncation actions that were applied during assembly.

retrieval_status.description: Whether the retrieval system was called and returned results. 'available' = retrieval ran and returned results; 'empty' = retrieval ran but returned no results; 'unavailable' = retrieval was not called or not yet implemented.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings raised during assembly (e.g., retrieval unavailable, truncation occurred).

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this assembly record was produced.
